hook.name: Loyalty  Volatility Dynamic Fee Hook
hook.description: Dynamic LP fee hook that adjusts the swap fee based on recent tick volatility (using configurable gamma and tick-delta threshold) and grants a discount to swappers holding a configured ERC-20 or ERC-721 loyalty token above a threshold. A fixed 0.01% developer fee is extracted from the output currency on every swap via afterSwapReturnsDelta. Fee bounds and loyalty parameters are configurable per pool by the pool owner.
